# bytebase_service_account (Resource)

The service account resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_account_id` (String) The ID for the service account, which becomes part of the email.
- `title` (String) The display title of the service account.

### Optional

- `parent` (String) The parent resource. Format: projects/{project} for project-level, workspaces/{workspace id} for workspace-level. Defaults to the workspace if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) The timestamp when the service account was created.
- `email` (String) The service account email.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) The service account name in serviceAccounts/{email} format.
- `state` (String) The service account state.
